Test Cases/Android/03-Events/Open and Validate Event SMC-30950
comment("TC PURPOSE: Open Reservation-SMC-30950 from Event Catalogue and validate key details are displayed")
comment("STEP 0: Verify app session is running and user is on Event Catalogue (magnifying glass visible)")
logInfo("STEP 0: Verify app session is running and user is on Event Catalogue (magnifying glass visible)")
applicationrunning = CommonFunctions.isApplicationRunning()
if (!(applicationrunning))
reservationID = "Reservation-SMC-30950"
comment(STEP 1: Search and open event/reservation '$reservationID')
logInfo(STEP 1: Search and open event/reservation '$reservationID')
AndroidOnly.selectDesiredReservation(reservationID)
comment("STEP 2: Tap Choose Days & Times")
logInfo("STEP 2: Tap Choose Days & Times")
CommonFunctions.safeTap("Choose Days and Times Button", findTestObject("Object Repository/Android/03-Events Catalogue/Event SMC-30950/android.widget.Button - Choose Days  Times"), 60)
comment("STEP 3: Tap Edit Days")
logInfo("STEP 3: Tap Edit Days")
CommonFunctions.safeTap("Edit Days Item", findTestObject("Object Repository/Android/03-Events Catalogue/Event SMC-30950/android.widget.TextView - Edit Days"), 60)
comment("STEP 4: Select desired time/session from dropdown")
logInfo("STEP 4: Select desired time/session from dropdown")
CommonFunctions.safeTap("Select Desired Time Dropdown", findTestObject("Object Repository/Android/03-Events Catalogue/Event SMC-30950/android.view.View - Select Desired Time"), 10)
comment("")
comment("STEP 5: Verify selection controls are disabled (Select All/Clear Selection) and day checkbox is not checkable")
logInfo("STEP 5: Verify selection controls are disabled (Select All/Clear Selection) and day checkbox is not checkable")
if (verifyElementExist(findTestObject("Object Repository/Android/03-Events Catalogue/Event SMC-30950/android.widget.Button - Select All"), 20, CONTINUE_ON_FAILURE) == true)
if (verifyElementExist(findTestObject("Object Repository/Android/03-Events Catalogue/Event SMC-30950/android.widget.Button - Clear Selection"), 20, CONTINUE_ON_FAILURE) == true)
if (verifyElementExist(findTestObject("Object Repository/Android/03-Events Catalogue/Event SMC-30950/android.widget.CheckBox - Day Selection Checkbox"), 20, CONTINUE_ON_FAILURE) == true)
comment("STEP 6: Tap Confirm to apply day/time selection")
logInfo("STEP 6: Tap Confirm to apply day/time selection")
CommonFunctions.safeTap("Confirm Button", findTestObject("Object Repository/Android/03-Events Catalogue/Event SMC-30950/android.widget.Button - Confirm"), 10)
comment("STEP 7: Select attendee = Myself")
logInfo("STEP 7: Select attendee = Myself")
CommonFunctions.safeTap("Myself Button", findTestObject("Object Repository/Android/03-Events Catalogue/Event SMC-30950/android.widget.Button - Myself"), 20)
comment("STEP 8: Accept Waiver and Consent")
logInfo("STEP 8: Accept Waiver and Consent")
CommonFunctions.safeTap("Waiver and Consent Checkbox", findTestObject("Object Repository/Android/03-Events Catalogue/Event SMC-30950/android.widget.checkbox - Waiver and Consent"), 10)
comment("STEP 9: Verify Create Reservation is clickable")
logInfo("STEP 9: Verify Create Reservation is clickable")
verifyElementExist(findTestObject("Object Repository/Android/03-Events Catalogue/Event SMC-30950/android.widget.Button - Create Reservation"), 10)
verifyElementAttributeValue(findTestObject("Object Repository/Android/03-Events Catalogue/Event SMC-30950/android.widget.Button - Create Reservation"), "clickable", "true", 10)
comment("END: Open Event SMC-30950 validations completed")
logInfo("END: Open Event SMC-30950 validations completed")
